data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 1/17 (Tue), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your student's skill!

🗓️Period: 1/17 (Tue) After Maintenance – 1/23 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
